description: Style NoteThis summer we bring to you a pair of flip-flops from barbie that your little princess will not want to take off! Featuring an attractive print and purple straps, this pair is a unique blend of style and comfort. Team it with a frock and a matching hairband for a hot summer day.Product DetailsLavender flip-flops with print and branding on footbedPurple thong style strapsPatterned branding grooves on outsoleMaterial and CareRubberWipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight Style NoteThis summer we bring to you a pair of flip-flops from Barbie that your little princess will not want to take off!
